input.prompt: Black and white hand-drawn pencil storyboard sheet, classic film director storyboard, rough graphite sketch on clean white paper, 6 cinematic panels in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each panel a rectangular framed shot with a small hand-drawn number badge (7,8,9,10,11,12) in the top-left corner, consistent loose sketch line style across all panels, soft hatching shading, no color, no text captions. Setting: industrial plastic parts manufacturing factory. Panel 7, detail shot: a computer monitor showing a point cloud transforming into a 3D model of a part. Panel 8, medium shot: a design engineer at a CAD workstation, a rotating 3D model of the part on screen, focused. Panel 9, wide-to-detail: a CNC milling machine, the cutter biting into tooling, chips flying, dramatic backlight. Panel 10, wide shot: vacuum forming, a glowing thermal oven, a plastic sheet wrapping over a mold, a worker lowering the frame. Panel 11, medium shot: a master rolling resin with a roller over fiberglass mat. Panel 12, close-up: hands shaping and trimming a polyurethane foam product.
